title: Paludorchis laxiflora
taxonomy: Paludorchis laxiflora is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Paludorchis laxiflora is a monotypic genus, meaning that it consists of only one species. This species is native to New Guinea. More research is needed to confirm its classification within the orchid family.
